ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm (e.g., on-policy, off-policy) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the experiment (e.g., learning rate, discount factor) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the result belongs to */,
  "episode" INTEGER /* Episode number of the result */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward received in the episode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "q_learning_results" (
  "q_learning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Q-Learning result */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the Q-Learning value belongs to */,
  "q_learning_value" REAL /* Q-Learning value */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in the episode */,
  "next_state" TEXT /* Next state reached in the episode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the Q-Learning result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the Q-Learning result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("q_learning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_q_learning_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES experiment_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sarsa_results" (
  "sarsa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Sarsa result */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the Sarsa value belongs to */,
  "sarsa_value" REAL /* Sarsa value */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in the episode */,
  "next_state" TEXT /* Next state reached in the episode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the Sarsa result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the Sarsa result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sarsa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sarsa_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES experiment_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stddev_results" (
  "stddev_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard deviation result */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the standard deviation belongs to */,
  "stddev_type" TEXT /* Type of standard deviation (Q-Learning or Sarsa) */,
  "stddev_value" REAL /* Standard deviation value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the standard deviation result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the standard deviation result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stddev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stddev_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES experiment_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
